title: Scarlet Tower
description:
Join our Discord

Об игреKey Features• Heroes with unique weapons, abilities, and talents

• Over 70 weapons

• Weapon fusion system

• Over 200 passive abilities for building your build

• Racial Abilities

• Pets

• Runes

• Bestiary

• Over 20 hours of content

• Bosses with unique abilities

• Thousands of unlockables

• Long character progression

• Runs perfectly on Steam Deck

• Supports Ultrawide

• Day and Night Cycle

• Endless Mode
StartingHunt during the day, be hunted during the NIGHT! Fight bizarre monsters that will terrify you at night! Strengthen your hero by collecting relics, familiars from around the world.Day & Night CycleLook for relics and vendors that only spawn at night.
Weather EventsBe prepared!

Unique CharactersCharacters with unique customizable passives.

Enjoy it!
🧛‍♂️
description_short: Hunt during the day, be hunted during the NIGHT! Scarlet Tower is a gothic horror casual game with roguelike and RPG elements, like talent trees, classes, familiars and more!
